page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.hfr6.8xlarge is a memory-optimized virtual machine instance powered by the KVM hypervisor. It features 32 dedicated physical cores on an x86_64 Intel Xeon 8269CY processor operating at a clock speed of 3.1 GHz. The hardware configuration includes 256.0 GB of system memory, providing a ratio of 8.0 GB of RAM per core. This instance does not include local storage or GPU accelerators, meaning all storage requirements must be met via network-attached options. Network connectivity is supported by a baseline bandwidth of 10 Gbps.

In benchmark evaluations, the processor achieved a single-core stress-ng score of 1436.69 and a multi-core score of 30656.07. The memory subsystem demonstrated a read-only small block cached bandwidth of 1704.61 GB/sec, while the large block uncached read and write bandwidths reached 112.52 GB/sec and 49.63 GB/sec, respectively. For database and key-value store operations, the instance processed 28.86 million Redis SET operations per second and achieved a PassMark database operations score of 11530.5. Large language model inference benchmarks using a small 135M model yielded 1572.28 tokens per second for prompt processing and 85.73 tokens per second for text generation.

The qualitative cost profile of this instance reflects its memory-heavy architecture, where the 1:8 vCPU-to-RAM ratio offers resource density for memory-bound applications without the overhead of local storage hardware. The lack of local NVMe SSDs represents a tradeoff, requiring reliance on network storage for persistent data. This instance is suitable for memory-intensive workloads such as in-memory databases, caching layers, data processing pipelines, and enterprise applications requiring substantial RAM allocations per core.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.hfr6.8xlarge is a memory-optimized instance featuring 32 dedicated physical cores powered by an Intel Xeon 8269CY x86_64 processor running at 3.1 GHz. It is configured with 256.0 GB of RAM, establishing an 8.0 GB per core ratio, and operates on the KVM hypervisor. This instance does not include local storage or GPU accelerators, relying instead on network-attached storage and a baseline network bandwidth of 10 Gbps. Benchmark results show a multi-core stress-ng performance of 30656.07 and a Redis SET throughput of 28.86 million operations per second. The high memory-to-vCPU ratio makes this instance suitable for memory-intensive applications, in-memory databases, caching layers, and enterprise workloads that require substantial memory capacity without the need for local physical storage.
og_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.hfr6.8xlarge is a memory-optimized instance with 32 dedicated Intel Xeon cores, 256 GB RAM, and 10 Gbps network bandwidth, designed for memory-intensive enterprise workloads and databases.
meta_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.hfr6.8xlarge features 32 dedicated Intel Xeon cores and 256 GB RAM, optimized for memory-heavy database and caching workloads.
tagline: A memory-optimized virtual server featuring dedicated Intel Xeon processors and a high memory-to-core ratio for demanding database and caching workloads.

256.0 GB of system memory providing 8.0 GB per core
No local storage or GPU accelerators included
Optimized for in-memory databases, caching, and memory-heavy enterprise workloads
